# Rosetta

> Rosetta is an open-source agent skill that reconciles every AI coding agent's local conversation
> history (across 18 tools — Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Aider, opencode, Cline, Goose,
> and more) with git history and project docs into one cited "ground truth," and distills it into
> durable decision records (ADRs, PDRs, BDRs). The core collector and decision CLI are fully local,
> read-only, and pure-stdlib Python with zero dependencies. (Optional external-source ingestion via
> MCP — ADR 0012 — is agent-driven and opt-in; the core collector and CLI never touch the network.)

## What it does

- Discovers which projects on a machine have agent conversation history (`rosetta discover`).
- Reconciles a project's transcripts + git + docs into `.agents/ground-truth.md` — a cited snapshot
  with a loud coverage map that shows what was found and what was missed.
- Distills decisions into ADR (architecture), PDR (product), and BDR (business) records, each with
  provenance citations and a Proposed → Accepted → Superseded (or Deprecated / Rejected) status lifecycle.
- Resolves conflicts with a truth hierarchy: current code / git > committed decisions > docs >
  latest conversation > older conversation. A thing the transcripts only discussed is recorded as
  "intended," never asserted as "done."

## Key facts

- Supported agents: 18 transcript stores (Claude Code, Claude Agent-Mode, Codex, Factory/Droid,
  Cursor, Gemini CLI, opencode, Cline, Continue, Aider, Hermes, Qwen, Roo, Kilo, Goose, Crush,
  Windsurf, Augment).
- Privacy: core collector/CLI are 100% local, read-only, no network calls, no telemetry. Optional MCP ingestion (ADR 0012) is opt-in and agent-driven.
- Language: Python standard library only — no dependencies, no build step.
- License: MIT.

## Install

- skills.sh: `npx skills add tjboudreaux/rosetta`
- GitHub CLI: `gh skill install tjboudreaux/rosetta`

## Docs

- Repository: https://github.com/tjboudreaux/rosetta
- Getting started: https://github.com/tjboudreaux/rosetta/blob/main/skills/rosetta/docs/getting-started.md
- Supported agents & discovery: https://github.com/tjboudreaux/rosetta/blob/main/skills/rosetta/docs/agents.md
- Decision records (ADR/PDR/BDR): https://github.com/tjboudreaux/rosetta/blob/main/skills/rosetta/docs/decisions.md
- CLI reference: https://github.com/tjboudreaux/rosetta/blob/main/skills/rosetta/docs/cli.md
